title: docs: add install command to polli skill
author: voodoohop
pr_body_excerpt:
- Adds `npm i -g @pollinations/cli@latest` to the polli SKILL.md.
- The skill assumed `polli` was already on PATH; the old `@pollinations_ai` scope now 404s, so documenting the current scope prevents a dead install command.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

gist.headline: Path to Polli
gist.blurb: Updated the Polli CLI skill docs with the correct npm install command so you can get up and running without hitting a 404.
gist.summary: Added the `npm i -g @pollinations/cli@latest` install command to the Polli CLI SKILL.md documentation.
gist.impact: Developers using the Polli skill will now have the correct, working npm scope to install the CLI instead of encountering a 404 error from the old scope.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee and the Monitor Robot reading a technical manual together next to a glowing terminal. Represents documentation and installation instructions.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot reading a glowing lime green (#ecf874) retro terminal screen. A chunky Monitor Robot companion stands nearby holding a small pixelated instruction manual. Soft lavender and warm cream pastel gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
